name: Smoked Salmon & Goat Cheese Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1/2 recipe Basic Pie Crust Dough, see recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Line a 10-inch pie plate with the pie pastry, trimming and fluting the edge.
2. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes or until partially baked.
3. Sprinkle with half the Parmesan cheese. Layer with the salmon and green onions.
4. Beat the eggs, cream cheese, and goat cheese in a mixer bowl until smooth. Add the evaporated milk and pepper, beating well.
5. Pour over the layers. Sprinkle with the remaining Parmesan cheese and basil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 15 minutes before serving.
